title: rosa × dumetorum var. reussii
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. reussii is a rare and lesser-known variety of Rosa dumetorum, a species of rose native to Europe and western Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and thorny stems. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum var. reussii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and other minor health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Rosa × dumetorum var. reussii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
